input._comment_time_format: Options: gpst_seconds | gpst_week_sow | utc | mjd | unix | index
input._comment_time_columns: 0-based field indices that form the time token. Empty = field 0 only. Use [0,1] when date and time are in separate columns, e.g. '1990-01-01' '00:00:00'.
input._comment_delimiter: Field separator. Use ' ' for space-delimited files.
input._comment_comment_char: Lines starting with this character are skipped.
input._comment_columns: 1-based indices of value columns to load. Empty = load all value columns. Index counts from 1 after the time field(s).
input._comment_merge_strategy: Options: separate (each file -> independent series) | merge (all files concatenated and sorted).

plots._comment_time_format: X-axis label format. Options: mjd | utc | gpst_seconds | unix. Empty = inherit from input.time_format.

enabled._comment_generic: Generic plots applied to the original series.

stats._comment_hurst: Compute Hurst exponent. Slow for large series.

gap_filling._comment_max_fill_length: Max consecutive missing samples to fill. 0 = unlimited.
gap_filling._comment_gap_threshold_factor: Time jump > median_step * factor is treated as a gap. Default 1.5.
gap_filling._comment_min_series_years: Minimum series span in years for MEDIAN_YEAR gap filling.

pre_outlier._comment: Coarse outlier removal on the raw gap-filled series, before deseasonalization.
pre_outlier._comment_enabled: Set true to activate. Removes physically impossible values (sensor overflow, spikes).
pre_outlier._comment_method: Options: mad_bounds | iqr | mad | zscore. Recommended: mad_bounds (works without deseasonalization).
pre_outlier._comment_mad_multiplier: Threshold = median +/- k * MAD. Use large k (5.0-10.0) for coarse removal only.
pre_outlier._comment_iqr_multiplier: Used only when method=iqr. Standard box-plot rule: 1.5 (mild), 3.0 (extreme).
pre_outlier._comment_max_fill_length: Max consecutive outlier positions to fill. 0 = unlimited.

deseasonalization._comment_strategy: Options: median_year (climatological/GNSS, requires calendar timestamp) | moving_average (sensor/signal data) | none
deseasonalization._comment_ma_window_size: Window in samples for moving_average. Daily data: 365=1yr. 6h data: 1461=1yr. 1s data: 86400=1day.
deseasonalization._comment_median_year_min_years: Min years of data per slot in the median year profile. Slots below this produce NaN.

post_outlier._comment: Fine outlier removal on deseasonalized residuals, before change point detection.
post_outlier._comment_enabled: Set true to activate. Removes residual anomalies that would bias change point detection.
post_outlier._comment_method: Options: mad_bounds | iqr | mad | zscore. Recommended: mad or iqr on residuals.
post_outlier._comment_mad_multiplier: Use smaller k (3.0) for fine removal on residuals.
post_outlier._comment_max_fill_length: Max consecutive outlier positions to fill. 0 = unlimited.

detection._comment_min_segment_points: Min observations in a segment before detection is attempted.
detection._comment_min_segment_duration: Minimum segment duration before detection is attempted. Format: 1y | 180d | 6h | 30m | 60s. Overrides min_segment_seconds if set. For 6h data: 180d = ~6 months. For daily data: 1y = 1 year. For hourly: 90d. For second data: 1h.
detection._comment_min_segment_seconds: Alternative: min segment in seconds (used if min_segment_duration is absent). 0 = disabled.
detection._comment_significance_level: SNHT significance level. Options: 0.01 | 0.05 | 0.10. Lower = fewer detections.
detection._comment_acf_dependence_limit: If ACF lag-1 exceeds this, critical value is scaled by sigmaStar to correct for autocorrelation.

homogeneity._comment_apply_adjustment: If false, change points are detected but series is not modified.
